prevalence.source: Mental health epidemiology syntheses; WHO context
prevalence.trend: stable to increasing with stress and urbanization

incidence.source: Primary care and mental health cohort data

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to chronic symptoms and functional impairment
burden.mortalityRate: Low (indirect via comorbidity and suicide risk)

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Persistent excessive worry for >6 months with functional impairment; DSM-5 criteria

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; limited access to psychotherapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care and psychiatry
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT when available, SSRIs/SNRIs, lifestyle interventions
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Stigma and limited mental health workforce
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable medications and growing community mental health programs
